properties.name: api.security.token.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens.

properties.name: api.security.token.expiration
properties.description: Expiration time in milliseconds for JWT tokens.

properties.name: saap.scheduler.follow-up.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the follow-up notifications scheduler.

properties.name: saap.scheduler.waitlist.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the waitlist timeout scheduler.

properties.name: saap.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed by CORS.
